description: Extracts read sequences and qualities from the input fastq file and writes them into the output file in unaligned SAM or BAM format
author: GenePattern
plan:
## Picard.FastqToSam GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Picard.FastqToSam is a GenePattern module that Extracts read sequences and qualities from the input fastq file and writes them into the output file in unaligned SAM or BAM format

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: fastq.file, quality.format, sample.name, sort.order, output.format, output.prefix
- Optional: fastq.file.2, read.group.name, library.name, platform.unit, platform

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>jargs.jar<path.separator><libdir>FastqToSam.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-fastqToSam.jar org.genepattern.sam.FastqToSamWrapper -i<fastq.file> -f<fastq.file.2> -q<quality.format> -n<sample.name>  -r<read.group.name> -l<library.name> -u<platform.unit> -p<platform> -s<sort.order> -o<output.prefix>.<output.format>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: fastq.file
parameters.description: Input fastq file (optionally gzipped) for single end data, or first read in paired end data

parameters.name: fastq.file.2
parameters.description: The fastq file (optionally gzipped) for second read in paired end data

parameters.name: quality.format
parameters.description: A value describing how the quality values are encoded in the fastq

parameters.name: sample.name
parameters.description: Sample name to insert into the read group header

parameters.name: library.name
parameters.description: The library name to insert into the LB attribute in the read group header

parameters.name: platform.unit
parameters.description: The platform unit (often run_barcode.lane) to insert into the read group header

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: The platform type (e.g., Illumina, SOLiD) to insert into the read group header

parameters.name: output.format
parameters.description: Whether the file output format should be SAM or BAM

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: The prefix to use for the output file name
